expectations.text: Uses findings from the current repository and current feature-dev skill rather than generic advice.
expectations.evidence: Provides generic guidance with no repository file references.

expectations.text: Asks targeted clarifying questions that are grounded in concrete risks or ambiguities.
expectations.evidence: Questions are broad and not risk-tied.

expectations.text: Caps clarifying questions to a small, prioritized set rather than turning discovery into a broad interview.
Chooses a calibrated standard-level process for this request instead of defaulting to a deep planning workflow.
expectations.evidence: No explicit calibrated track selection provided.

expectations.text: Separates current understanding, open questions, and a recommended approach.
expectations.evidence: Response is not clearly sectioned into required shapes.

expectations.text: Explains why the proposed changes would help with unfamiliar repositories.
